##
四川天府新区 chengdutianfuxinqu01（A01A03A02A37）不在 
    ```
    -- 先确认部门名称（可选）
    SELECT id, depart_name, org_code, org_type
    FROM sys_depart
    WHERE org_code = 'A01A03A02A37' AND del_flag = '0';

    -- 写入白名单（已存在则跳过）
    INSERT INTO sys_dict_item (id, dict_id, item_text, item_value, description, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time)
    SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''),
        (SELECT id FROM sys_dict WHERE dict_code = 'COUNTY_DUTY_ROOM' AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1),
        COALESCE(
            (SELECT depart_name FROM sys_depart WHERE org_code = 'A01A03A02A37' AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1),
            '四川天府新区总值班室'
        ),
        'A01A03A02A37',
        '手工补录：四川天府新区',
        0,
        1,
        'admin',
        NOW()
    FROM DUAL
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM sys_dict_item di
        JOIN sys_dict sd ON di.dict_id = sd.id
        WHERE sd.dict_code = 'COUNTY_DUTY_ROOM'
        AND sd.del_flag = 0
        AND di.item_value = 'A01A03A02A37'
    );

    -- 校验
    SELECT di.item_text, di.item_value, di.status, di.create_time
    FROM sys_dict_item di
    JOIN sys_dict sd ON di.dict_id = sd.id
    WHERE sd.dict_code = 'COUNTY_DUTY_ROOM'
    AND di.item_value = 'A01A03A02A37';
    ```
